description: For each tabular data screen, validate CSV export presence, functionality, and high-level output sanity.

testCases.title: Student Applications: CSV export availability and sanity
preConditions: Seed data loaded
User logged in with role-specific demo account
Screen contains at least one row of tabular/list data

checks.name: Export option visible
checks.expectation: Export CSV button/link/menu action is visible and enabled on the screen.

checks.name: Export action works
checks.expectation: CSV file downloads successfully after triggering export.

checks.name: High-level data sanity
checks.expectation: CSV has header row, at least one data row (when UI has rows), and obvious key fields align with on-screen values for 2-3 sampled records.

steps: Click Export CSV (or equivalent export action)
Compare 2-3 sampled rows with current UI values
expectedResult: CSV structure and sampled values are logically correct
